creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Ugh, it looks like this patch should have been committed a long time ago. 

Turns out that atacontrol will be a dead thing soon and all of your options 
will need to be sent through camcontrol. 

CAM_ATA already supports this feature via: 

kern.cam.ada.0.write_cache: -1 

So, this patch will most likely be rejected.
